title: Eagles of Death Metal: Nos Amis (Our Friends)
original_title: Eagles of Death Metal: Nos Amis (Our Friends)
overview: The November 13, 2015 terrorist attack in Paris claimed 130 lives around the city -- 89 of them at the Eagles of Death Metal’s Bataclan Theatre concert. The American rock band recount their experiences before and after the tragic events.
